title: Prepare and maintain plant displays
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare and maintain plant displays demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare the display site

pcs.text: Confirm plant display activities with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm plant display activities with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm plant display activities with supervisor.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Prepare the display site according to planting plan and supervisor instructions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare the display site according to planting plan and supervisor instructions.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check site irrigation as instructed.
